steps.title: Calculate the population when it reaches 140% of initial
steps.content:
The initial population is 60 beetles. When the population reaches 140% of this amount:
$$1.40 \times 60 = 84 \text{ beetles}$$

steps.title: Calculate 75% of this population to find how many moved
steps.content:
The biologist moves 75% of these 84 beetles to the second habitat:
$$0.75 \times 84 = 63 \text{ beetles}$$
Therefore, the biologist moved 63 beetles to the second habitat.
